clips.title: Rooftop Leap
clips.prompt: Comic book art style, bold black ink outlines, halftone dots, flat vivid colors, dynamic action lines. Present day. A dramatic city skyline of blocky towers at dusk, billboards, a gap between rooftops. Dusk, action. A person in a sleek superhero suit and cape leaps across the gap between rooftops mid-air, dynamic pose, cape flaring. Speed lines, dramatic clouds, distant traffic. Punchy comic lighting, saturated inks. Side tracking. Dynamic comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Office
clips.prompt: Comic book art style, bold black ink outlines, halftone dots, flat vivid colors, dramatic shadow. Noir era. A dim detective's office, venetian blinds casting hard shadow stripes, a desk lamp, a ceiling fan. Night, tense. A person in a trench coat leans over the desk under the blinds' shadow, brooding. A revolver, a case file, a whiskey glass. Hard noir key with deep ink shadow. Slow dolly in. Noir comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Blast Radius
clips.prompt: Comic book art style, bold black ink outlines, halftone dots, flat vivid colors, dynamic action lines. Present day. A city street with a huge stylized explosion blooming behind, debris flying, action lines radiating. Day, explosive. A person in tactical gear sprints toward the camera away from the blast, determined, mid-stride. Flying debris, a fireball, motion streaks. Punchy orange blast light. Handheld push in. Explosive comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Reveal
clips.prompt: Comic book art style, bold black ink outlines, halftone dots, flat vivid colors, dramatic shadow. Present day. A rain-streaked back alley at night, a single overhead light, brick walls, fire escapes. Night, dramatic. A person in a dramatic hooded costume stands in a bold power pose under the light, half in shadow. Steam, a puddle, graffiti. Hard dramatic key, halftone shadow. Slow dolly in. Dramatic comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Hot Pursuit
clips.prompt: Comic book art style, bold black ink outlines, halftone dots, flat vivid colors, dynamic action lines. Present day. A speeding convertible on a city highway, motion-blurred background, speed lines. Day, fast. A person in a jacket leans out of the speeding car, hair whipping, reaching forward. Blurred traffic, streaking lines, flying papers. Bright punchy daylight. Side tracking. Kinetic comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Knockout
clips.prompt: Comic book art style, bold black ink outlines, halftone dots, flat vivid colors, dynamic action lines. Present day. A boxing ring under harsh spotlights, ropes, a roaring crowd of halftone silhouettes. Night, intense. A person in boxing gear throws a powerful punch, impact burst and action lines exploding from the fist. Sweat drops, the ring floor, flying spit. Harsh ring spotlight. Slow dolly in. Explosive comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Standoff
clips.prompt: Comic book art style, bold black ink outlines, halftone dots, flat vivid colors, dramatic shadow. Present day. A rooftop at night, a huge full moon behind, water towers, a glowing city below. Night, tense. A person in a caped costume stands in a bold heroic stance on the roof edge, cape billowing, silhouetted against the moon. Antennae, pigeons, drifting clouds. Cool moonlight rim, deep ink shadow. Static wide. Heroic comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Jump
clips.prompt: Comic book art style, bold black ink outlines, halftone dots, flat vivid colors, dynamic action lines. Present day. A dramatic gap between two industrial rooftops, a big ramp, a sunset sky. Dusk, daring. A person in a riding suit launches a motorcycle across the gap mid-air, dynamic tilt, speed lines trailing. Flying dust, sparks, a wheelie arc. Warm sunset punch light. Side tracking. Daring comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Stop the Press
clips.prompt: Comic book art style, bold black ink outlines, halftone dots, flat vivid colors, dynamic action lines. Present day. A busy newsroom, desks, monitors, papers flying, a big wall clock. Day, urgent. A person in a shirt and tie bursts through the double doors holding up a document, mouth open shouting, dynamic lean. Flying papers, startled coworkers, motion lines. Bright office light, punchy inks. Handheld push in. Urgent comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Liftoff
clips.prompt: Comic book art style, bold black ink outlines, halftone dots, flat vivid colors, dynamic action lines. Sci-fi. A colorful alien launch platform, a starry sky, glowing thrusters, action bursts. Night, explosive. A person in a sleek space-hero suit blasts upward with glowing rocket boots, arm forward, energy trailing. Star bursts, exhaust flames, speed lines. Vivid thruster glow. Crane rise. Heroic comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Last Call
clips.prompt: Comic book art style, bold black ink outlines, halftone dots, flat vivid colors, dramatic shadow. Present day. A retro neon diner at night, a long counter, chrome stools, a jukebox. Night, moody. A person in a leather jacket leans on the counter with a confident smirk, half-lit by neon. A coffee mug, a neon sign, a pie case. Cool neon key with warm accents, halftone shadow. Slow dolly in. Cool comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Swing
clips.prompt: Comic book art style, bold black ink outlines, halftone dots, flat vivid colors, dynamic action lines. Present day. A canyon of tall city buildings, a bright sky, a glass-and-steel corridor between towers. Day, exhilarating. A person in a sleek costume swings on a line between the buildings, dynamic arc, cape and line trailing. Speed lines, glinting windows, birds. Bright punchy daylight. Side tracking. Exhilarating comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.
